prompt: Write a short proposal doc for a dark-factory documentation organiser. Cover: (1) what 'organised' means for dark-factory docs; (2) the choice between a one-time organise pass vs a recurring skill vs a Marshall job; (3) what it should check — sprawl, stale dates, overlap/duplication, orphans not in docs/INDEX.md, broken cross-references; (4) where it should live. DONE = a proposal doc to decide from. Do NOT build it — propose only.
